ads.title: 2023 Tesla Model 3 Long Range
ads.description: Mint condition Tesla Model 3 Long Range. Only 15,000 miles. White exterior, black interior. Autopilot included. Still under factory warranty. No accidents or scratches.

ads.title: Luxury Downtown Apartment with City Views
ads.description: Stunning 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom apartment in the heart of downtown. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances, and a private balcony overlooking the city skyline. Building amenities include a pool, gym, and 24/7 concierge.

ads.title: MacBook Pro M3 Max (16-inch, 1TB SSD)
ads.description: Brand new MacBook Pro with the latest M3 Max chip. 36GB RAM, 1TB SSD. Space Black color. Box opened only to verify contents. Comes with original Apple Care+ for 3 years.

ads.title: Professional Plumbing Services 24/7
ads.description: Licensed and insured plumber with 15 years of experience. We handle everything from leaky faucets to complete bathroom remodels. Fast response time and guaranteed satisfaction.

ads.title: Sony A7IV Mirrorless Camera Body
ads.description: Excellent condition Sony A7IV body only. Shutter count is around 5000. Includes 2 original batteries, charger, and strap. No signs of wear.

ads.title: 2019 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road
ads.description: Great truck, perfect for off-roading or daily driving. 4x4, 6-speed automatic, V6 engine. Upgraded tires and suspension. Has 45,000 miles. Clean title.

ads.title: Vintage Rolex Submariner (1980)
ads.description: Classic Rolex Submariner reference 5513. Excellent patina on the dial and hands. Keeping perfect time. Recently serviced.

ads.title: Spam Ad - Buy Followers Now
ads.description: Get 10,000 followers on your social media account overnight! 100% legal, no bots. Click the link in bio.
